sentences.target: Ich habe mein Billet im Zug vergessen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhaːbə maɪ̯n biˈjeː ɪm tsuːk fɛɐ̯ˈɡɛsn̩./

translations.de: Ich habe mein Billet im Zug vergessen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhaːbə maɪ̯n biˈjeː ɪm tsuːk fɛɐ̯ˈɡɛsn̩./
translations.en: I forgot my ticket on the train.
translations.es: Me dejé el billete en el tren.
translations.fr: J'ai oublié mon billet dans le train.
translations.it: Ho dimenticato il biglietto sul treno.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把车票忘在火车上了。
translations.yue: 我喺火車上遺低咗張車票。
translations.ru: Я забыл свой билет в поезде.
translations.vi: Tôi để quên vé trên tàu.
translations.nl: Ik ben mijn kaartje in de trein vergeten.
translations.uk: Я забув свій квиток у поїзді.
translations.hi: मैं अपना टिकट ट्रेन में भूल गया।
translations.el: Ξέχασα το εισιτήριό μου στο τρένο.
translations.nb: Jeg glemte billetten min på toget.
translations.sv: Jag glömde min biljett på tåget.
translations.da: Jeg glemte min billet i toget.
translations.ja: 電車に切符を置き忘れました。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary (present, 1st sg) forming the Perfekt with the past participle 'vergessen'.
Possessive determiner modifying 'Billet'; accusative neuter singular, marks possession.
Common noun; direct object (accusative, neuter sg). Swiss Standard German term for 'ticket'.
Contracted preposition 'in' + definite article 'dem'; governs dative for a locative PP.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'in'; masculine dative singular; location.
Past participle serving as the main lexical verb in Perfekt with 'haben'.

sentences.target: Du zeigst mir bitte dein Billet.

translations.de: Du zeigst mir bitte dein Billet.
translations.fr: Montrez-moi votre billet, s'il vous plaît.
translations.it: Per favore, mi mostri il biglietto.
translations.pt: Por favor, mostre o seu bilhete.
translations.he: בבקשה תראה לי את הכרטיס שלך.
translations.vi: Vui lòng cho tôi xem vé của bạn.
translations.nl: Laat me alstublieft uw kaartje zien.
translations.uk: Будь ласка, покажіть мені свій квиток.
translations.el: Παρακαλώ δείξτε μου το εισιτήριό σας.
translations.ja: 切符を見せてください。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present, 2nd sg); takes a dative indirect object ('mir') and an accusative direct object ('Billet').
Personal pronoun (1st sg, dative); indirect object/recipient.
Politeness marker/interjection used to soften the request.
Possessive determiner modifying 'Billet'; accusative neuter singular, indicates possession.
Common noun; direct object (accusative, neuter sg).

sentences.target: Heute kaufe ich ein Billet für den Bus.
sentences.reading: /ˈhɔʏ̯tə ˈkaʊ̯fə ɪç aɪ̯n biˈjeː fyːɐ̯ deːn bʊs./

translations.de: Heute kaufe ich ein Billet für den Bus.
translations.ipa: /ˈhɔʏ̯tə ˈkaʊ̯fə ɪç aɪ̯n biˈjeː fyːɐ̯ deːn bʊs./
translations.en: Today I'm buying a ticket for the bus.
translations.es: Hoy voy a comprar un billete para el autobús.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, je vais acheter un billet pour le bus.
translations.it: Oggi compro un biglietto per l'autobus.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天我要买一张公交车票。
translations.yue: 我今日會買一張巴士車票。
translations.ru: Сегодня я куплю билет на автобус.
translations.pt: Hoje vou comprar um bilhete para o ônibus.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi mua vé xe buýt.
translations.nl: Vandaag koop ik een kaartje voor de bus.
translations.uk: Сьогодні я купую квиток на автобус.
translations.hi: आज मैं बस का टिकट खरीद रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Σήμερα αγοράζω εισιτήριο για το λεωφορείο.
translations.nb: I dag kjøper jeg billett til bussen.
translations.id: Hari ini saya membeli tiket bus.
translations.sv: I dag köper jag en bussbiljett.
translations.ro: Astăzi cumpăr un bilet de autobuz.
translations.cs: Dnes si kupuji lístek na autobus.
translations.da: I dag køber jeg en billet til bussen.
translations.ja: 今日はバスの切符を買います。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb modifying the clause; indicates time.
Finite main verb (present, 1st sg); action performed by the subject.
1st person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject.
Indefinite article modifying 'Billet'; accusative neuter singular.
Common noun; direct object (accusative, neuter sg).
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a PP indicating intended use/beneficiary.
Definite article; accusative masculine singular modifying 'Bus'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'für'; masculine accusative singular.

sentences.target: Der Kontrolleur prüft das Billet im Tram.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ kɔntʁɔˈløːɐ̯ pryːft das biˈjeː ɪm tʁam./

translations.de: Der Kontrolleur prüft das Billet im Tram.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ kɔntʁɔˈløːɐ̯ pryːft das biˈjeː ɪm tʁam./
translations.en: The conductor checks the ticket on the tram.
translations.es: El revisor revisa el billete en el tranvía.
translations.fr: Le contrôleur vérifie le billet dans le tramway.
translations.it: Il controllore verifica il biglietto sul tram.
translations.pt: O fiscal confere o bilhete no elétrico.
translations.vi: Nhân viên soát vé kiểm tra vé trên tàu điện.
translations.ar: المفتش يتحقق من التذكرة في الترام.
translations.nl: De controleur controleert het kaartje in de tram.
translations.hu: A kalauz a villamoson ellenőrzi a jegyet.
translations.hi: कंडक्टर ट्राम में टिकट की जाँच करता है.
translations.el: Ο ελεγκτής ελέγχει το εισιτήριο στο τραμ.
translations.ja: 車掌が路面電車で切符を確認します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular modifying 'Kontrolleur'.
Common noun; subject of the clause; masculine nominative singular.
Finite main verb (present, 3rd sg); denotes the checking action.
Definite article; accusative neuter singular modifying 'Billet'.
Common noun; direct object (accusative, neuter sg).
Contracted preposition 'in' + 'dem'; governs dative; introduces locative PP.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'in'; dative (neuter sg in Swiss usage).
